cotct-pf2e-conversion.note: pf2e 8.2.0 ships zero affliction-type compendium docs and deletes the 'affliction' Item subtype at init (pf2e.mjs); shipped as a structured effect per scripts/extract_afflictions.mjs findings.

description.value:
Disease (manufactured) — Vorel's phage, weaponized by the cult of Urgathoa at Queen Ileosa's order (Ch.2). Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] for ordinary exposure, rising to @Check[type:fortitude|dc:30] against concentrated sources (the cult's brewing vats and raw fluids); on a critical failure the victim skips the onset and immediately suffers Stage 1. Onset 1 day.

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 day); Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 day); Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 day); Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}.

Using this doc: apply the effect to an infected creature, set its badge to the current stage, and apply the linked conditions by hand (the PF1e Con+Cha damage becomes drained/enfeebled). The @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.fxBVSuppressant1]{suppressant} halts progression and steps the stage down one per day rather than curing outright; the epidemic itself runs on the @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-journals.JournalEntry.cotctGuide000001.JournalEntryPage.R96jUmyAvMxCISST]{Epidemic Clock}.

Why not an affliction-type item: pf2e 8.2.0 ships no affliction-type compendium docs and disables the subtype at init, so this is a structured effect instead (see this doc's flags).

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
